title: 9 Herbal Tinctures For Grey Hair
description: Cassia auriculata tinctures contains a rich mixture of bioactive constituents, including flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids. These compounds have been found to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce the oxidative stress and inflammation that can contribute to grey hair. The flavonoids present in Cassia auriculata, such as auriculatin and auriculatinol, have been shown to inhibit the activity of tyrosinase, an enzyme involved in the production...
